description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a dark matte finish and a detachable keyboard. The screen is wide and displays the Windows 10 operating system interface, with a thin bezel and a built-in webcam at the top center. The keyboard features a large touchpad and chiclet-style keys, and the device is supported by a rear kickstand, allowing it to stand upright on flat surfaces. The back of the device is plain, with no visible branding or ports, and the overall design is minimalist and professional. The laptop appears lightweight and portable, suitable for use in urban environments such as cafes, parks, or on public transportation. The materials suggest a combination of metal, plastic, and glass, giving it a sturdy yet refined appearance.
description: A slim, dark-colored laptop with a detachable keyboard, rear kickstand, and a wide screen displaying Windows 10. The design is minimalist and professional, with a matte finish and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen displaying Windows 10, full keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, open screen, and visible kickstand.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back cover and the extended kickstand, with no visible ports or branding.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the thinness, open screen, and kickstand.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and turned on, displaying the Windows 10 desktop and application windows.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row, no numeric keypad, chiclet-style keys.
